description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of two main sections, each constructed from rough-hewn horizontal planks attached to thick, uneven vertical posts. The wood appears dark and weathered, with visible grain and natural irregularities, giving it a handcrafted, naturalistic look. One section of the fence is slightly ajar, suggesting the presence of a simple gate mechanism, while the other section remains fixed. The posts are round and robust, with no decorative caps, and the rails are unevenly spaced, enhancing the organic, utilitarian aesthetic. The overall structure is low and open, suitable for demarcating boundaries in parks, gardens, or rural urban edges. There are no visible metal fasteners or embellishments, emphasizing a purely functional design.
description: A rustic, handcrafted wooden fence with rough-hewn planks and thick, uneven posts, featuring a simple gate section. The dark, weathered wood and open design evoke a natural, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Front view showing both fence sections, with one section ajar as a gate and the other fixed, highlighting the uneven planks and thick posts.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the fence, emphasizing the thickness of the posts and the layered arrangement of the planks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of both fence sections, with the gate section more clearly visible and the rough texture of the wood apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the staggered alignment of the planks and posts.
